title: viola alba var. lactea
intro: Viola alba var. lactea, also known as the white violet, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family and is characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Viola alba var. lactea include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
